meta.title: Papadopoulos Law Office | Civil Law
meta.description: Papadopoulos Law Office — specializing in Civil, Contract and Inheritance Law, as well as Real Estate Law in Athens.

hero.tagline: Serious, hands-on support for every legal matter — with deep knowledge of civil law and a commitment to results.

about.heading: History & Philosophy
paragraphs: Papadopoulos Law Office was founded in 2009 by Ioannis Papadopoulos, with the aim of providing high-level legal services in civil law. Over the years, the firm has handled hundreds of cases in contract, inheritance, and property law, building relationships of trust with individuals and families throughout Attica.

We believe every case is unique and deserves personal attention, clear communication, and realistic guidance — not vague promises. We combine deep knowledge of the legal framework with practical experience in Greek courts, so we can recommend the solution that truly serves our client's interests.

services.heading: Areas of Practice
services.intro: We provide comprehensive legal coverage in civil law, tailored to each client's needs.

items.title: Civil Law
items.description: Legal representation and advisory across all types of civil disputes, from negotiation through litigation, with a focus on protecting your interests.

items.title: Contract & Obligations Law
items.description: Drafting, review, and enforcement of contracts, damages claims, and dispute resolution arising from contractual relationships, ensuring your transactions stand on solid legal ground.

items.title: Inheritance Law
items.description: Acceptance of inheritance, estate distribution, wills, and resolution of inheritance disputes, handled with discretion and attention to each family's particular needs.

items.title: Real Estate Law
items.description: Title due diligence, sale and lease agreements, and representation in property and real estate disputes.

items.title: Family Law
items.description: Divorce, child custody, alimony, and property arrangements, approached with sensitivity during particularly difficult moments in your life.

members.name: Ioannis Papadopoulos
members.title: Founder & Principal Attorney
members.bio: A Supreme Court-admitted attorney with over 15 years of experience in civil law. A graduate of the Law School of the National and Kapodistrian University of Athens, with postgraduate studies in Civil Law. A member of the Athens Bar Association, he has represented individuals and businesses in complex contract and property law cases.

members.name: Maria Georgiadou
members.title: Associate Attorney
members.bio: Specializes in inheritance and family law, with particular emphasis on mediation and out-of-court dispute resolution. A graduate of the Law School of Aristotle University of Thessaloniki, she combines legal precision with a human approach in every case she undertakes.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Briefly describe your case and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! Your message was sent successfully — we'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

errors.name: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.tagline: Responsible legal guidance, delivered with expertise and consistency, at every stage of your case.
